title: Record-Chain Submit Response
description: Schema for the response from POST /record-chain/submit. The receipt is not a final chain record; final records are appended server-side.

receipt_id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Format: rcg-YYYYMMDD-<first 12 chars of submission_sha256>. Suffix -02 etc. for collisions.

submission_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical submission JSON.

pending_file_path.description: Path where the pending record was written. Format: record-chain/pending/<receipt_id>.<record_type>.pending.json

intake_submission_path.description: Path where the full intake submission was stored. Format: record-chain/intake/submissions/YYYY/MM/<receipt_id>.submission.json

receipt_path.description: Path where the receipt was stored. Format: record-chain/intake/receipts/YYYY/MM/<receipt_id>.receipt.json

server_created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the server processed the submission.

append_status.description: Status of the record-chain append. queued = will be processed by internal workflow.

public_chain_status.description: URL to the public record-chain status API.
